languages.text: "Вы про "Гимн Потерянных", Лорд-капитан. Под нее мы живем и умираем. Если хотите что-то про нее узнать, спрашивайте, я наизусть знаю".
"You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."
languages.original_text: "Вы про "Гимн Потерянных", Лорд-капитан. Под нее мы живем и умираем. Если хотите что-то про нее узнать, спрашивайте, я наизусть знаю".

traits.locale_text: "You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost', Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. Should you wish to learn anything about it, ask. I know it by heart."
"You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost', Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. Should you wish to learn anything about it, ask. I know it by heart."
"You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

"You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

languages.text: “您说的是‘迷失者赞歌’，舰长大人。我们因它而活，为它而死。如果您想知道什么，只管问我。我背得滚瓜烂熟。”
languages.original_text: "You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

traits.locale_text: “您说的是‘迷失者赞歌’，舰长大人。我们因它而活，为它而死。如果您想知道什么，只管问我。我背得滚瓜烂熟。”

languages.text: "Kayıpların İlahisi'ni kastediyorsunuz Lord Kaptan. Onunla yaşar, onunla ölürüz. Hakkında bilgi edinmek isterseniz sormanız yeterli. Ezbere bilirim."
languages.original_text: "You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

traits.locale_text: "Kayıpların İlahisi'ni kastediyorsunuz Lord Kaptan. Onunla yaşar, onunla ölürüz. Hakkında bilgi edinmek isterseniz sormanız yeterli. Ezbere bilirim."

languages.text: « Vous devez parler de l'Hymne des égarés. C'est notre ligne directrice, de la vie jusqu'à la mort. N'hésitez pas à me poser des questions si vous souhaitez en savoir plus, je le connais par cœur. »
languages.original_text: "You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

traits.locale_text: « Vous devez parler de l'Hymne des égarés. C'est notre ligne directrice, de la vie jusqu'à la mort. N'hésitez pas à me poser des questions si vous souhaitez en savoir plus, je le connais par cœur. »

languages.text: «Se refiere al "Himno por los caídos", Lord Capitán. Vivimos y morimos por él. Si quiere saber cualquier cosa al respecto, pregunte. Me lo sé de memoria».
languages.original_text: "You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

traits.locale_text: «Se refiere al "Himno por los caídos", Lord Capitán. Vivimos y morimos por él. Si quiere saber cualquier cosa al respecto, pregunte. Me lo sé de memoria».

languages.text: "Das war die 'Hymne der Verlorenen,' Lord Captain. Nach ihr leben und sterben wir. Falls Ihr etwas über sie erfahren wollt, fragt einfach. Ich kenne sie auswendig."
languages.original_text: "You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

traits.locale_text: "Das war die 'Hymne der Verlorenen,' Lord Captain. Nach ihr leben und sterben wir. Falls Ihr etwas über sie erfahren wollt, fragt einfach. Ich kenne sie auswendig."

languages.text: 「失われた者の賛歌」のことですね、船長。それによって我々は生かされ、それによって我々は死を迎えます。もし何か知りたいことがあれば、聞いてください。私はそれを心から知っているのです。」
languages.original_text: "You mean the 'Hymn of the Lost,' Lord Captain. By it we live, and by it we die. If you want to learn anything about it, just ask. I know it by heart."

traits.locale_text: 「失われた者の賛歌」のことですね、船長。それによって我々は生かされ、それによって我々は死を迎えます。もし何か知りたいことがあれば、聞いてください。私はそれを心から知っているのです。」
